summary: Comprehensive e2e testing for Trend Syria Arabic PWA completed across all 5 user roles (Admin, Seller, Food Seller, Buyer, Delivery). All login flows work correctly. Fixed critical issue: food_stores missing is_active field and food_items were in wrong collection (food_items instead of food_products).

minor.issue: Food stores were not returning due to missing is_active field in seed data - FIXED
Food items were stored in food_items collection but API queries food_products - FIXED by copying data

issues: Product click sometimes blocked by emergent badge overlay - may need z-index adjustment

action_items: Update seed data in server.py to use food_products collection instead of food_items
Ensure is_active: true is included when creating food_stores in seed data
critical_code_review_comments: server.py seed data uses db.food_items but food.py API queries db.food_products - collection name mismatch
Food store seed data missing is_active field which is required by GET /api/food/stores API filter
All 5 user types (admin, seller, food_seller, buyer, delivery) login correctly
Push notification system is working - prompts shown for food_seller and delivery users
Sound toggle buttons working correctly for food_seller and delivery dashboards

success_rate.backend: 100% - All API endpoints working after data fixes
success_rate.frontend: 95% - All features working, minor overlay issues on product clicks

seed_data_creation: Database fixes applied: added is_active to food_stores, copied food_items to food_products
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 user roles tested and working. Food section now displays restaurants and items correctly after data fixes. Key test selectors: data-testid='login-btn', data-testid='phone-input', data-testid='password-input', data-testid='login-submit-btn', data-testid='add-product-btn', data-testid='sound-toggle-btn', data-testid='push-notification-btn'. Mobile viewport used: 390x844

seller_flow.tabs: PASS - products, reviews, ads, discounts, analytics, store

admin_flow.statistics_cards: PASS - Shows 1 sellers, 1 users, 8 products, 1 delivery, 2 orders

food_section.restaurant_display: PASS - مطعم الشام visible after fix

data_fixes_applied.food_stores: Added is_active: true, store_type: restaurants to existing store
data_fixes_applied.food_products: Copied 8 items from food_items collection to food_products collection

rca_of_issue: Food section showing empty because: 1) food_stores.is_active field was missing (seed data didn't include it), 2) food_items were stored in wrong collection (food_items vs food_products). The API queries food_products with is_active:true filter but seed data used food_items collection.
